creator: ady@warpnet.ro
text:
Hi,

On Sat, 11 Dec 1999, Akinori MUSHA aka knu wrote:

> 	Isn't anybody except me confidential to commit this update?
> 

 But I thought I left word to Steve to commit if he doesn't hear from me
in two days ?!?... And it happened so that I couldn't take care of it and
Steve should've committed...

> 
> 	Now I plan to supersede it with UW IMAP 4.7 + IMAP-utils for
> 3.5-RELEASE or 4.0-RELEASE: IMAP-utils include mailbox converter,
> {IMAP,mailbox}<=>{IMAP,mailbox} exchanger, IMAP MDA, and so on!
> 

 OK, anyway; now it seems I'm a bit less stressed by work -- let's see
these patches ! I know I start to rotten, but hopefully I'll recover.

 BTW, I only have 3.3-RELEASE here, no 4.0 branch; do you have any 4.0
system there for testing ?


 Thanks, I await your patches,
 Ady (@warpnet.ro)
